vouchers.name: Happy Hour
vouchers.description: +1 Restock every customer, for the rest of the run.

vouchers.name: Double Shift
vouchers.description: +1 Mix every customer, for the rest of the run.

vouchers.name: Wider Rail
vouchers.description: +1 Rail size, for the rest of the run.

vouchers.name: Neon Sign
vouchers.description: Uncommon and Rare Patrons show up twice as often in the shop.

vouchers.name: Deep Cellar
vouchers.description: Cellar Packs contain 1 extra card to choose from.

vouchers.name: Bouncer
vouchers.description: Once per Night: turn tonight's VIP away for a random other one.
